summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kawesh agency website. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Service name propagation working correctly. Forms submitting successfully with proper validation and success messages. Responsive design working well. Critical SEO implementation issue identified.

critical_issues.issue: Helmet meta tags not being applied - page shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of service-specific titles
critical_issues.impact: Critical for SEO - search engines won't see proper meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, or JSON-LD structured data

passed_tests: Service Inquiry Submission - All service types working
Consultation Booking - Date/time selection and submission working
Contact Form Submission - /contact page working correctly
Service Name Propagation - Correctly passed to both inquiry and consultation forms
Form Validation - Required fields, email format, message length validation working
Success Messages - Toast notifications appearing correctly after form submissions
Responsive Design - Mobile (375px), tablet (768px), desktop (1920px) all working
Dark Mode Toggle - Present and functional
Service Detail Pages - All loading correctly with full content
Backend Data Storage - All form data correctly saved to MongoDB
API Error Handling - 422 validation errors returned correctly for invalid data
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix SEO implementation in ServiceDetailPage.jsx. The Helmet component is not updating page meta tags correctly. All service detail pages show generic 'Emergent | Fullstack App' title instead of service-specific titles with proper Open Graph, Twitter Cards, and JSON-LD structured data. This is blocking proper search engine optimization.
